title: canvas.gop

messages.description: GOP info <gop status, x size, y size, coords (x1, y1, x2, y1)>

body: The [canvas.gop] object outputs the information of a "graph on parent" (aka 'GOP'), which is a subpatch with a visible graph in the parent. It can also query the GOP info with the depth argument (1 goes up to the parent patch, 2 queries the parent's parent and so on).
